message:
refactor(mux-server): extract socket environment setup and daemonized child args into helpers

Improves code organization in the mux server startup path by extracting
two self-contained responsibilities into dedicated functions.

- set_mux_socket_environment(): extracted from spawn_listener(), now
  also publishes FRANKENTERM_UNIX_SOCKET alongside the legacy
  WEZTERM_UNIX_SOCKET so sibling tools and spawned processes can
  discover the mux under either name
- daemonized_child_args(): extracted the argument-building logic from
  spawn_daemonized_copy() into a pure function that returns Vec<OsString>,
  making the daemonization path easier to test and reason about
- spawn_listener() and spawn_daemonized_copy() now delegate to these
  helpers, reducing inline complexity

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
